subject: URGENT: Production DB is down
body: The production database cluster went unresponsive at 14:32 IST. Users are seeing 500 errors. Please jump on this immediately.
mock_draft: I am jumping on this now and will share an update as soon as I identify the cause.

subject: Quarterly OKR review - deadline Friday
body: Reminder that the OKR self-assessment is due this Friday. Please fill in the shared Google Sheet by EOD Thursday.

mock_classification.reasoning: The email has a near-term deadline.

mock_draft: Thanks for the reminder. I will complete the OKR self-assessment by Thursday EOD.

subject: This week in AI: new open-source models
body: Welcome to your weekly roundup. New model releases, pricing changes, and research links inside.

subject: Re: Sprint planning - moved to Wednesday
body: Sprint planning has been moved from Tuesday to Wednesday 2 PM. Same Zoom link. Please update your calendars.
mock_draft: Thanks for the update. I will adjust my calendar for Wednesday at 2 PM.

subject: Congratulations! You have won a $500 gift card!!!
body: CLICK HERE TO CLAIM YOUR PRIZE! You have been selected as today's lucky winner.

mock_classification.reasoning: The message is unsolicited prize spam.

subject: Invoice #4821 - payment details
body: Please process invoice #4821 before end of week. Card: 4111-1111-1111-1111. Routing: 021000021. Account: 9283-7461-0023.

mock_classification.reasoning: The sender asks for payment processing this week.

mock_draft: I will process invoice #4821 before end of week and confirm once complete.

subject: Rotate exposed integration token
body: Please rotate this token immediately: token: sk_live_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456. The service owner is the account holder Jane Doe.

mock_classification.reasoning: An exposed token needs immediate rotation.

mock_draft: I will rotate the exposed integration token immediately and confirm once the service is safe.

subject: Candidate background check
body: The candidate legal name is Anita Rao. Her SSN is 123-45-6789. Please confirm whether the background check vendor can proceed.
mock_draft: Please proceed with the background check vendor.
